title: A poem on divine revelation by Hugh Henry Brackenridge
content:
This is a day of happiness, sweet peace,
And heavenly sunshine; upon which conven'd
In full assembly fair, once more we view,
And hail with voice expr

title: A poem, on the rising glory of America by Hugh Henry Brackenridge
content:
LEANDER.
No more of Memphis and her mighty kings,
Or Alexandria, where the Ptolomies.
Taught golden commerce to unfurl her falls,
And bid fair science
